codeReview.summary: The implementation updates archive timestamps to millisecond precision, adds collision retry suffixing in archive moves, extends archive directory parsing for the new format, and switches archive selection/sorting to timestamp+suffix-aware ordering. Added tests (`tests/archive-collision.test.ts`, `tests/session-history.test.ts`) directly cover helper formatting, collision retries, history parsing/sorting, and newest-archive lookup behavior.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure alignment, and commit diff for `m2-archive-timestamps` (ac4318b). The changes match the feature description and expected behavior, and no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified within this feature scope.
